column1: # Room Sense — dual-OTA partition table for ESP32-S3 with 8 MB flash.
#   otadata  : tracks which OTA slot is current
#   ota_0    : firmware slot A (boots here on first flash)
#   ota_1    : firmware slot B (target of next OTA)
#   storage  : SPIFFS for diagnostics / future use
# Each app slot is 2 MB. Current binary is ~1 MB so we have plenty of
# headroom before needing to expand the slot size.
